SEARCH
Package clientGui.user

Class SubscriberHistoryController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.user.SubscriberHistoryController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController, javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class SubscriberHistoryController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>, javafx.fxml.Initializable
Controller for viewing a subscriber's order history.

    • initData

      public void initData(int subscriberId, CustomerType isSubscriber, Employee employee, Customer customer)
      Initializes data for the controller and requests history from the server.
      Parameters:
      subscriberId - The ID of the subscriber
      isSubscriber - The customer type
      employee - The employee object (if accessed by an employee)
      customer - The customer object
